title: astragalus spinosus var. kneuckeri
intro: Astragalus spinosus var. kneuckeri, also known as Kneucker's milkvetch, is a plant species within the legume family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory properties, which help the body to adapt to stress and regulate immune responses. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to protect against oxidative stress, inflammation, and cell damage. Astragalus spinosus var. kneuckeri is typically prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used to support immune function, reduce fatigue, and promote overall well-being.
